content.problemStatement:
You are given an array AAA of size NNN.

Using the array AAA, we define the variables S1S_1S1‚Äč and S2S_2S2‚Äč:


Select an index iii (1‚Č§i<N)(1\le i \lt N)(1‚Č§i<N);
Define S1=(A1‚äēA2‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAi)S_1 = (A_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus A_i)S1‚Äč=(A1‚Äč‚äēA2‚Äč‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAi‚Äč) ‚ą£|‚ą£ (A(i+1)‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAN)(A_{(i+1)} \oplus \ldots \oplus A_N)(A(i+1)‚Äč‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAN‚Äč), where ‚äē\oplus‚äē and ‚ą£|‚ą£ denote the bitwise XOR and bitwise OR operations respectively;
Define S2=(A1‚äēA2‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAi)S_2 = (A_1 \oplus A_2 \oplus \ldots \oplus A_i)S2‚Äč=(A1‚Äč‚äēA2‚Äč‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAi‚Äč) &\&& (¬¨(A(i+1)‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAN))(\neg(A_{(i+1)} \oplus \ldots \oplus A_N))(¬¨(A(i+1)‚Äč‚äē‚Ä¶‚äēAN‚Äč)), where ‚äē,\oplus,‚äē, &,\&,&, and ¬¨\neg¬¨ denote the bitwise XOR, bitwise AND, and bitwise NOT operations respectively.
Your task is to **maximise** the value (S1‚ąíS2)(S_1 - S_2)(S1‚Äč‚ąíS2‚Äč) by selecting an optimal value of iii.

**Note:** Each element is regarded as an unsigned 323232-bit integer. Thus, if X=0X=0X=0, ¬¨X=4294967295\neg X=4294967295¬¨X=4294967295, which can also be written as (232‚ąí1)(2^{32}-1)(232‚ąí1). Similarly, if X=1X=1X=1, ¬¨X=4294967294\neg X=4294967294¬¨X=4294967294, which can also be written as (232‚ąí2)(2^{32}-2)(232‚ąí2).

You should answer QQQ queries. Each query is of the form:


XXX YYY: Given index XXX (1‚Č§X‚Č§N)(1\le X \le N)(1‚Č§X‚Č§N) and an integer YYY, set AX:=YA_X := YAX‚Äč:=Y and find the **maximum** value of (S1‚ąíS2)(S_1 - S_2)(S1‚Äč‚ąíS2‚Äč) possible.
Each query is **independent**. In other words, for each query, we modify on the original array.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ, the size of AAA and the number of queries.
The next line contain NNN space-separated integers, A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1,A_2,\ldots ,A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
The next QQQ lines describe the queries. For the ithi^{th}ith (1‚Č§i‚Č§Q)(1\le i \le Q)(1‚Č§i‚Č§Q) line, there are two space-separated integers XXX and YYY, describing that for this query, we need to set AX=YA_X = YAX‚Äč=Y.


Output Format
For each query, output on a new line, the **maximum** value of (S1‚ąíS2)(S_1-S_2)(S1‚Äč‚ąíS2‚Äč), you can get after modification.

Explanation:
Query 111: We set A4=2A_4 = 2A4‚Äč=2. Thus, the array is A=[1,2,3,2]A=[1,2,3,2]A=[1,2,3,2]. The optimal way is to select i=1i = 1i=1. We get:

S1=1S_1 = 1S1‚Äč=1 ‚ą£|‚ą£ (2‚äē3‚äē2)=3(2\oplus 3\oplus 2) = 3(2‚äē3‚äē2)=3
S2=1S_2 = 1S2‚Äč=1 &\&& (¬¨(2‚äē3‚äē2))=1(\neg(2\oplus 3\oplus 2)) = 1(¬¨(2‚äē3‚äē2))=1 &\&& (¬¨3)=1(\neg3) = 1(¬¨3)=1 &\&& 4294967292=04294967292 = 04294967292=0

Thus, (S1‚ąíS2)=3(S_1 - S_2) = 3(S1‚Äč‚ąíS2‚Äč)=3. It can be shown that this is the maximum value of S1‚ąíS2S_1-S_2S1‚Äč‚ąíS2‚Äč possible for any (1‚Č§i<N)(1\le i \lt N)(1‚Č§i<N).

S1=1S_1 = 1S1‚Äč=1 ‚ą£|‚ą£ (2‚äē0‚äē4)=7(2\oplus 0\oplus 4) = 7(2‚äē0‚äē4)=7
S2=1S_2 = 1S2‚Äč=1 &\&& (¬¨(2‚äē0‚äē4))=1(\neg(2\oplus 0\oplus 4)) = 1(¬¨(2‚äē0‚äē4))=1 &\&& (¬¨6)=1(\neg6) = 1(¬¨6)=1 &\&& 4294967289=14294967289 = 14294967289=1

Thus, (S1‚ąíS2)=7‚ąí1=6(S_1 - S_2) = 7 - 1 = 6(S1‚Äč‚ąíS2‚Äč)=7‚ąí1=6. It can be shown that this is the maximum value of S1‚ąíS2S_1-S_2S1‚Äč‚ąíS2‚Äč possible for any (1‚Č§i<N)(1\le i \lt N)(1‚Č§i<N).
Query 333: We set A4=7A_4 = 7A4‚Äč=7. Thus, the array is A=[1,2,3,7]A=[1,2,3,7]A=[1,2,3,7]. The optimal way is to select i=3i = 3i=3. We get:

S1=(1‚äē2‚äē3)S_1 = (1\oplus 2\oplus 3)S1‚Äč=(1‚äē2‚äē3) ‚ą£|‚ą£ 7=77 = 77=7
S2=(1‚äē2‚äē3)S_2 = (1\oplus 2\oplus 3)S2‚Äč=(1‚äē2‚äē3) &\&& (¬¨7)=0(\neg7) = 0(¬¨7)=0 &\&& (¬¨7)=0(\neg7) = 0(¬¨7)=0

Thus, (S1‚ąíS2)=7‚ąí0=7(S_1 - S_2) = 7 - 0 = 7(S1‚Äč‚ąíS2‚Äč)=7‚ąí0=7. It can be shown that this is the maximum value of S1‚ąíS2S_1-S_2S1‚Äč‚ąíS2‚Äč possible for any (1‚Č§i<N)(1\le i \lt N)(1‚Č§i<N).
